name: tollgate-agent-sdk
description: Drop-in client SDK for AI agents that need to pay HTTP 402 paywalls. Handles x402 challenges, USDC settlement on Solana, retries, and safety guards automatically.

scripts.lint: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/core/client.js && node --check src/core/payment.js && node --check src/core/signer.js && node --check src/core/guards.js && node --check src/core/spendTracker.js && node --check src/core/errors.js && node --check src/tools/langchain.js
